emails.subject: Re: Hess Energy Trading Co LLC
emails.body: Re: Hess Energy Trading Co LLC There does not appear to be anything that would prevent us from trading weather derivatives under this master. There is a weather represenation that should be added to the confirmations but other than that there are no other modifications that I know of. (Tana please let me know if I am wrong.) Just as an aside I noted in the database that it appears that a little over a year an a half ago the cp wanted to do all physical and finanacial trading through Hess Energy Services Company LLC. Did anything come of this? I do not believe a master was signed for this entity. I just want to confirm that Hess Energy Trading Company LLC is the active trading entity. Thanks, Brent Tanya Rohauer@ECT 08/04/2000 03:59 PM

emails.subject: Re: Hess Energy Trading Co LLC

emails.subject: Re: Hess Energy Trading Co LLC
emails.body: Thanks for the info. All trading is done through Hess Energy Trading Company LLC. Every once in a while they will do something under Services (which is guaranteed as well), but it is not enough to warrant a master. Thanks, Tanya From: Brent Hendry@ENRON on 08/07/2000 09:05 AM
